<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Social App Pro</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        /* ================= CSS VARIABLES ================= */
        :root {
            --primary-color: #4e54c8;
            --secondary-color: #8f94fb;
            --bg-color: #f0f2f5;
            --white: #ffffff;
            --card-bg: #ffffff;
            --text-main: #2d3436;
            --text-light: #636e72;
            --border-color: #f0f0f0;
            --input-bg: #f9f9f9;
            --danger: #ff6b6b;
            --success: #00b894;
            --verify-blue: #1877F2; /* Facebook Blue for Badge */
            --shadow-soft: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            --gradient-bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #4e54c8 0%, #8f94fb 100%);
        }

        /* DARK THEME VARIABLES */
        body.dark-theme {
            --bg-color: #000000;
            --white: #18191a; 
            --card-bg: #242526;
            --text-main: #e4e6eb;
            --text-light: #b0b3b8;
            --border-color: #3e4042;
            --input-bg: #3a3b3c;
            --shadow-soft: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; }
        body { background-color: var(--bg-color); color: var(--text-main); padding-bottom: 80px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s; }

        /* Verified Badge Style */
        .verified-badge { color: var(--verify-blue); font-size: 14px; margin-left: 4px; vertical-align: middle; }

        /* ================= SPLASH / LOADING SCREEN ================= */
        #splash-screen {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: var(--card-bg); z-index: 9999;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease-out;
        }
        .loader-logo { font-size: 40px; color: var(--primary-color); margin-bottom: 20px; animation: pulse 1.5s infinite; }
        .spinner { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 4px solid #f3f3f3; border-top: 4px solid var(--primary-color); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }
        @keyframes spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
        @keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }

        /* ================= TOAST NOTIFICATION ================= */
        #toast-box {
            position: fixed; top: -100px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
            z-index: 10000; transition: top 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            background: #333; color: #fff; padding: 12px 25px; border-radius: 50px;
            box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
            font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; min-width: 280px; justify-content: center;
        }
        #toast-box.active { top: 40px; }
        #toast-box.success { background: var(--success); }
        #toast-box.error { background: var(--danger); }

        /* ================= AUTH SECTION ================= */
        #auth-section {
            display: none; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: var(--gradient-bg); z-index: 3000; padding: 20px;
        }
        .auth-box { 
            width: 100%; max-width: 380px; text-align: center; 
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); padding: 40px 30px; border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }
        .auth-box h2 { margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; }
        .input-group { position: relative; margin-bottom: 15px; }
        .input-group i { position: absolute; left: 15px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #636e72; }
        .auth-box input {
            width: 100%; padding: 14px 14px 14px 45px; border: 1px solid #e1e1e1; 
            border-radius: 50px; outline: none; background: #f9f9f9; transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .auth-box input:focus { border-color: var(--primary-color); background: white; }
        .btn {
            width: 100%; padding: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; 
            font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; margin-top: 10px; transition: 0.2s;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;
        }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--gradient-bg); color: white; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(78, 84, 200, 0.3); }
        .btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
        .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.7; cursor: not-allowed; }
        .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #636e72; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid transparent;}
        .btn-close-auth { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; color: white; font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; }

        /* ================= APP CONTAINER ================= */
        #app-container { display: block; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; min-height: 100vh; position: relative; }

        /* ================= SEARCH PAGE ================= */
        #search-page {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-color); z-index: 5000; display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        #search-page.active { display: flex; }
        .search-header {
            background: var(--card-bg); padding: 15px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; z-index: 10;
        }
        .search-back-btn { font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-main); cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; }
        .search-bar-container {
            flex: 1; position: relative;
        }
        .search-input {
            width: 100%; padding: 12px 20px 12px 40px; border-radius: 30px; border: none;
            background: var(--input-bg); color: var(--text-main); outline: none; font-size: 15px;
        }
        .search-icon-input { position: absolute; left: 15px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-light); }
        
        .search-results-container {
            flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 15px;
        }
        .search-section-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-light); margin: 15px 0 10px; }
        .user-result-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px; background: var(--card-bg);
            border-radius: 15px; margin-bottom: 10px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
        }
        .user-result-pic { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; margin-right: 12px; }
        .user-result-info h4 { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-main); font-weight: 600; }
        .user-result-info span { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-light); }

        /* ================= STORIES SECTION ================= */
        .stories-container {
            padding: 15px 15px 5px; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow-x: auto;
            scrollbar-width: none; margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .stories-container::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .story-circle-wrapper {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 70px;
        }
        .story-ring {
            width: 65px; height: 65px; border-radius: 50%; padding: 3px;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, #f09433, #e6683c, #dc2743, #cc2366, #bc1888);
            position: relative;
        }
        .story-ring img {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover;
            border: 3px solid var(--bg-color); background: var(--bg-color);
        }
        .story-user-name { font-size: 11px; max-width: 70px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: var(--text-main); }

        /* ================= HOME FEED & POSTS ================= */
        .page { display: none; padding: 15px; animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease; padding-bottom: 100px; }
        .page.active { display: block; }
        @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

        .home-top-bar {
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 10px 15px;
        }
        .app-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; background: var(--gradient-bg); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
        .top-icon-btn { font-size: 22px; color: var(--text-main); cursor: pointer; padding: 5px; }

        .post-card {
            background: var(--card-bg); border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); overflow: hidden; position: relative;
            border: 1px solid var(--card-bg);
        }
        .post-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 15px; justify-content: space-between; }
        .post-header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; }
        .user-avatar {
            width: 45px; height: 45px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; margin-right: 12px; 
            border: 2px solid var(--primary-color); padding: 2px;
        }
        .user-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-main); display: flex; align-items: center; }
        .post-time { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-light); font-weight: normal; display: block; }

        .post-desc { padding: 0 15px 10px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-main); line-height: 1.6; }
        
        .desc-text-content { display: inline; }
        .desc-toggle-btn {
            color: var(--text-light); font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; margin-left: 5px;
        }
        .desc-toggle-btn:hover { color: var(--primary-color); text-decoration: underline; }

        .carousel-wrapper { position: relative; width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 500px; min-height: 250px; background: #eee; overflow: hidden; }
        .carousel-track {
            display: flex; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; 
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; scrollbar-width: none; width: 100%; height: 100%;
        }
        .carousel-track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .carousel-item {
            flex: 0 0 100%; width: 100%; height: auto; scroll-snap-align: center;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #000;
        }
        .post-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; display: block; max-height: 500px; cursor: pointer; }
        
        .image-counter-badge {
            position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 15px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); color: white;
            padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px); pointer-events: none;
        }

        .action-bar {
            display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 20px; gap: 25px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .action-btn {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-light);
            transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .action-btn:hover { color: var(--primary-color); transform: scale(1.1); }
        .action-btn.liked { color: var(--danger); }
        .action-count { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }

        .btn-post-follow {
            background: var(--input-bg); color: var(--primary-color);
            border: none; padding: 6px 15px; border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .btn-post-follow.following { background: transparent; color: var(--text-light); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); }

        /* ================= FULL SCREEN POST VIEWER ================= */
        #full-post-viewer-modal {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: #000; z-index: 9500; display: none;
        }
        #full-post-viewer-modal.active { display: block; }
        .fp-close-btn {
            position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px; z-index: 20;
            color: white; font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
        }
        .fp-feed {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow-y: scroll;
            scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; scroll-behavior: auto; 
        }
        .fp-item {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative;
            scroll-snap-align: start; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
            background: #111; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .fp-img-container { 
            width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; 
            position: relative;
        }
        .fp-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; transition: 0.3s; }
        
        /* Full Screen Navigation Arrows */
        .fs-nav-btn {
            position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
            color: white; font-size: 30px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer;
            z-index: 15; backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
        }
        .fs-prev { left: 10px; }
        .fs-next { right: 10px; }

        /* Right Side Actions */
        .fp-overlay-right {
            position: absolute; bottom: 80px; right: 15px; z-index: 10;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 20px;
        }
        .fp-profile-pic-wrap { position: relative; margin-bottom: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; }
        .fp-profile-pic-wrap:active { transform: scale(0.9); }
        .fp-profile-pic { width: 45px; height: 45px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid white; object-fit: cover; }
        .fp-action-btn { 
            color: white; font-size: 30px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
            text-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        .fp-action-btn span { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 5px; }
        .fp-action-btn.liked { color: #ff4444; }

        /* Bottom Left Info */
        .fp-overlay-bottom {
            position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; padding: 20px 70px 30px 15px;
            z-index: 9; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8), transparent);
        }
        .fp-username { color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 8px; text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: flex; align-items: center;}
        .fp-desc { 
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; 
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); 
            display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .fp-desc.expanded { -webkit-line-clamp: unset; overflow: visible; }
        .fp-see-more, .fp-close-desc {
            color: #b2b2b2; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 5px; display: inline-block;
        }
        .fp-close-desc { color: #b2b2b2; display: none; }
        
        /* ================= COMMENT SECTION ================= */
        #comment-sheet-modal {
            position: fixed; bottom: -100%; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 70vh;
            background: var(--card-bg); border-radius: 25px 25px 0 0; z-index: 10000;
            box-shadow: 0 -10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transition: bottom 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275);
            display: flex; flex-direction: column;
        }
        #comment-sheet-modal.active { bottom: 0; }
        .sheet-header { padding: 15px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); position: relative; }
        .sheet-handle { width: 50px; height: 5px; background: var(--border-color); border-radius: 5px; margin: 0 auto 10px; }
        .close-sheet { position: absolute; right: 20px; top: 15px; font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-light); }
        .comments-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px; background: var(--bg-color); }
        .single-comment { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 18px; animation: slideIn 0.3s ease; }
        @keyframes slideIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
        .comment-avatar { width: 35px; height: 35px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); }
        .comment-content { 
            background: var(--card-bg); padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 0 18px 18px 18px; 
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); max-width: 85%; 
        }
        .comment-user { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-main); margin-bottom: 3px; display: flex; align-items: center; }
        .comment-text { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-main); line-height: 1.4; }
        .comment-input-area {
            padding: 15px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; 
            gap: 6px; background: var(--card-bg); padding-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .comment-input-area input {
            flex: 1; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 30px; 
            outline: none; background: var(--input-bg); transition: 0.3s; color: var(--text-main);
        }
        .comment-input-area input:focus { background: var(--card-bg); border-color: var(--primary-color); }
        .btn-send-comment {
            background: var(--primary-color); color: white; border: none; width: 45px; height: 45px;
            border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(78, 84, 200, 0.3); transition: 0.2s;
        }
        #comment-overlay {
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); z-index: 9900; display: none; backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
        }
        #comment-overlay.active { display: block; }

        /* ================= PUBLISH & PROFILE ================= */
        .publish-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 25px; }
        .publish-header h3 { font-size: 22px; color: var(--text-main); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
        
        .publish-box { 
            background: var(--card-bg); padding: 30px 25px; border-radius: 30px; 
            box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: 0.3s;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        
        .publish-box textarea {
            width: 100%; height: 140px; padding: 20px; border: none; background: var(--input-bg);
            border-radius: 20px; resize: none; margin-bottom: 20px; outline: none;
            font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-main); transition: 0.3s;
            box-shadow: inset 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
        }
        .publish-box textarea:focus { background: var(--card-bg); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--primary-color); }
        
        .upload-area {
            border: 2px dashed #cfcfcf; padding: 35px 20px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 20px; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text-light); margin-bottom: 25px; transition: 0.3s; background: var(--input-bg);
            position: relative; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .upload-area:hover { border-color: var(--primary-color); background: rgba(78, 84, 200, 0.03); }
        .upload-icon { 
            font-size: 40px; color: var(--primary-color); margin-bottom: 15px; 
            background: #fff; padding: 18px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .upload-area:hover .upload-icon { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(10deg); }
        .upload-text { font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; }
        
        #preview-container { 
            display: flex; gap: 12px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; 
            display: none; scrollbar-width: none;
        }
        .preview-wrapper { position: relative; display: inline-block; flex-shrink: 0; transition: 0.3s; }
        .preview-wrapper:active { transform: scale(0.95); }
        .preview-thumb { 
            width: 90px; height: 90px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 15px; 
            border: 2px solid var(--white); box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); 
        }
        .remove-thumb-btn {
            position: absolute; top: -6px; right: -6px; background: var(--danger); color: white;
            border-radius: 50%; width: 24px; height: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border: 2px solid var(--white);
        }

        .btn-publish {
            width: 100%; padding: 16px; border: none; border-radius: 50px;
            background: var(--gradient-bg); color: white; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(78, 84, 200, 0.4); transition: transform 0.2s;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;
        }
        .btn-publish:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

        .profile-header {
            background: var(--card-bg); padding: 40px 20px 30px; border-radius: 0 0 30px 30px; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); margin-bottom: 25px; position: relative;
        }
        .header-icon-btn {
            position: absolute; top: 20px; font-size: 20px; 
            color: var(--text-main); cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; background: var(--bg-color);
            border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        }
        .back-btn-profile { left: 20px; }
        .settings-btn-profile { right: 20px; }

        .profile-pic-wrapper { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 15px; }
        .profile-pic-large {
            width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; 
            border: 4px solid var(--card-bg); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
        }
        .edit-icon-overlay {
            position: absolute; bottom: 5px; right: 5px;
            background: var(--primary-color); color: white;
            width: 35px; height: 35px; border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer; border: 3px solid var(--card-bg);
        }
        .profile-name { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-main); margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
        
        .profile-stats {
            display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; width: 100%;
            padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .stat-box { text-align: center; }
        .stat-num { display: block; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-main); }
        .stat-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-light); }

        .my-posts-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; padding: 0 15px; }
        .grid-item { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1/1; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; background: #ddd; }
        .grid-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: 0.3s; }
        .multi-icon { position: absolute; top: 5px; right: 5px; color: white; font-size: 12px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 3px 5px; border-radius: 5px; }
        .delete-btn {

    <script type="module">
        import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.22.0/firebase-app.js";

        import { getFirestore, collection, addDoc, query, orderBy, onSnapshot, where, deleteDoc, doc, updateDoc, arrayUnion, arrayRemove, getDoc, setDoc, getDocs } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.22.0/firebase-firestore.js";

        // CONFIGURATION
        const firebaseConfig = {
            apiKey: "AIzaSyBxSS5Kg_d83UBqfwjw6Pxks4Fa6_XWwYw",
            authDomain: "sohil-app.firebaseapp.com",
            projectId: "sohil-app",
            storageBucket: "sohil-app.firebasestorage.app",
            messagingSenderId: "660854994910",
            appId: "1:660854994910:web:c91f5f921ef1dac2d94f4f"
        };
        const IMGBB_API_KEY = "d06c826685d0f189de4e4f502ce16f67"; 

        const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
        const auth = getAuth(app);
        const db = getFirestore(app);
        
        let currentUser = null;
        let activePostIdForComments = null;
        let commentsUnsubscribe = null;
        let myFollowingList = []; 
        let userViewUnsubscribe = null;
        let allActiveStories = [];
        let allFeedPosts = []; 
        let allUsersData = {}; // GLOBAL CACHE FOR USER DATA (Verification & Updates)

        // THEME HANDLING
        window.toggleTheme = () => {
            const body = document.body;
            body.classList.toggle('dark-theme');
            const isDark = body.classList.contains('dark-theme');
            localStorage.setItem('theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
        }

        const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme');
        if (savedTheme === 'dark') {
            document.body.classList.add('dark-theme');
            document.getElementById('dark-mode-toggle').checked = true;
        }

        window.showToast = (msg, type = "success") => {
            const toast = document.getElementById("toast-box");
            const toastMsg = document.getElementById("toast-msg");
            toast.className = "";
            void toast.offsetWidth; 
            toast.classList.add(type); 
            toast.classList.add("active");
            toastMsg.innerText = msg;
            const icon = toast.querySelector("i");
            icon.className = type === "success" ? "fas fa-check-circle" : "fas fa-exclamation-circle";
            setTimeout(() => { toast.classList.remove("active"); }, 3000);
        };

        // HELPER TO GET USER DATA (With Fallback)
        function getUserData(uid, fallbackName, fallbackPhoto) {
            const user = allUsersData[uid];
            if(user) {
                return {
                    name: user.name,
                    photo: user.photo || (user.photoURL || "https://via.placeholder.com/40"),
                    isVerified: user.isVerified || false
                };
            }
            return { name: fallbackName || "Unknown", photo: fallbackPhoto || "https://via.placeholder.com/40", isVerified: false };
        }

        function getVerifyBadge(isVerified) {
            return isVerified ? `<i class="fas fa-check-circle verified-badge"></i>` : '';
        }

        // FETCH ALL USERS REALTIME (Solves Update Issue & Badge Issue)
        function listenToAllUsers() {
            onSnapshot(collection(db, "users"), (snapshot) => {
                snapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    allUsersData[doc.id] = doc.data();
                    // normalize photo
                    if(!allUsersData[doc.id].photo && allUsersData[doc.id].photoURL) {
                         allUsersData[doc.id].photo = allUsersData[doc.id].photoURL;
                    }
                });
                // Re-render things if needed
                if(currentUser) loadUserProfile(); 
                // We rely on feed re-render trigger or simple DOM update if needed. 
                // Ideally, we re-render feed, but for performance we might wait.
                // For this demo, let's just let the next render cycle pick it up or trigger feed.
                const feed = document.getElementById('feed-container');
                if(feed && feed.innerHTML !== "") {
                     // Trigger re-render of feed to show updates immediately
                     // But prevent infinite loop if used incorrectly.
                     // A simple way is to re-run the render logic from the `allFeedPosts` array.
                     renderFeedFromCache();
                }
            });
        }

        // LISTEN TO CURRENT USER FOLLOWINGS
        function listenToMyFollowings(uid) {
            onSnapshot(doc(db, "users", uid), (docSnap) => {
                if (docSnap.exists()) {
                    const data = docSnap.data();
                    myFollowingList = data.following || [];
                    document.getElementById('stat-followers').innerText = (data.followers || []).length;
                    document.getElementById('stat-following').innerText = (data.following || []).length;
                    
                    document.getElementById('profile-name-display').innerHTML = 
                        data.name + getVerifyBadge(data.isVerified);
                    document.getElementById('profile-pic-display').src = data.photoURL || data.photo;

                    updateFeedFollowButtons();
                }
            });
        }

        function updateFeedFollowButtons() {
            const btns = document.querySelectorAll('.btn-post-follow, #uv-follow-btn');
            btns.forEach(btn => {
                let targetUid = btn.getAttribute('data-uid');
                if(btn.id === 'uv-follow-btn') return; 
                updateSingleFollowButtonUI(btn, targetUid);
            });
        }

        function updateSingleFollowButtonUI(btn, targetUid) {
            if(myFollowingList.includes(targetUid)) {
                btn.classList.add('following');
                btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Following';
                if(btn.id === 'uv-follow-btn') {
                    btn.innerText = "Unfollow";
                    btn.className = "btn btn-outline"; 
                    btn.style.border = "1px solid var(--primary-color)";
                }
            } else {
                btn.classList.remove('following');
                btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Follow';
                if(btn.id === 'uv-follow-btn') {
                    btn.innerText = "Follow";
                    btn.className = "btn btn-primary";
                    btn.style.border = "none";
                }
            }
        }

        async function uploadToImgBB(file) {
            const formData = new FormData();
            formData.append("image", file);
            const response = await fetch(`https://api.imgbb.com/1/upload?key=${IMGBB_API_KEY}`, { method: "POST", body: formData });
            const data = await response.json();
            return data.data.url;
        }

        window.openSearch = () => {

        };

        window.closeSearch = () => {
            document.getElementById('search-page').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('search-box-input').value = "";

        };

        window.handleSearchInput = () => {
            const term = document.getElementById('search-box-input').value.toLowerCase().trim();
            const container = document.getElementById('search-results');
            
            if(term.length < 1) {
                container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align: center; color: var(--text-light); margin-top: 50px;">Type something to search...</div>';
                return;
            }

            let html = '';
            
            // Search Users (From Cache)
            const matchedUsers = Object.values(allUsersData).filter(u => u.name && u.name.toLowerCase().includes(term));
            
            if(matchedUsers.length > 0) {
                html += '<div class="search-section-title">Users</div>';
                matchedUsers.forEach(u => {
                    const safeName = u.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                    const safePhoto = u.photo || u.photoURL;
                    html += `
                        <div class="user-result-item" onclick="closeSearch(); openUserProfile('${u.uid}', '${safeName}', '${safePhoto}')">
                            <img src="${safePhoto}" class="user-result-pic">
                            <div class="user-result-info">
                                <h4>${u.name} ${getVerifyBadge(u.isVerified)}</h4>
                                <span>User</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                });
            }

            // Search Posts (From Feed Cache)
            const matchedPosts = allFeedPosts.filter(p => p.description && p.description.toLowerCase().includes(term));
            
            if(matchedPosts.length > 0) {
                html += '<div class="search-section-title">Posts</div>';
                matchedPosts.forEach(p => {
                    const author = getUserData(p.userId, p.userName, p.userPhoto);
                    const desc = p.description.length > 40 ? p.description.substring(0,40) + "..." : p.description;
                    html += `
                        <div class="user-result-item" onclick="closeSearch(); openFullPostViewer('${p.id}')">
                            <img src="${p.imageUrl}" class="user-result-pic" style="border-radius:5px;">
                            <div class="user-result-info">
                                <h4>${author.name} ${getVerifyBadge(author.isVerified)}</h4>
                                <span>"${desc}"</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                });
            }

            if(matchedUsers.length === 0 && matchedPosts.length === 0) {
                html = '<div style="text-align: center; color: var(--text-light); margin-top: 50px;">No results found.</div>';
            }

            container.innerHTML = html;
        };

        // ================= STORY FETCH =================
        function loadStories() {
            const q = query(collection(db, "stories"), orderBy("expiresAt", "desc"));
            onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
                const storiesBar = document.getElementById('stories-bar');
                storiesBar.innerHTML = "";
                allActiveStories = [];
                const now = Date.now();
                const userMap = new Map();

                snapshot.forEach(docSnap => {
                    const data = docSnap.data();
                    if(data.expiresAt > now) {
                        data.id = docSnap.id;
                        allActiveStories.push(data);
                        if(!userMap.has(data.userId)) { userMap.set(data.userId, data); }
                    }
                });

                let userStories = Array.from(userMap.values()).slice(0, 7);
                if(userStories.length === 0) { storiesBar.style.display = 'none'; return; }
                storiesBar.style.display = 'flex';

                userStories.forEach(story => {
                     // Fetch FRESH data
                     const author = getUserData(story.userId, story.userName, story.userPhoto);

                     const div = document.createElement('div');
                     div.className = "story-circle-wrapper";
                     div.onclick = () => openStoryViewer(story.id);
                     div.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="story-ring"><img src="${author.photo}" onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/60'"></div>
                        <span class="story-user-name">${author.name}</span>
                     `;
                     storiesBar.appendChild(div);
                });
            });
        }

        window.openStoryViewer = (startStoryId) => {
            if(allActiveStories.length === 0) return;
            const modal = document.getElementById('story-viewer-modal');
            const feedContainer = document.getElementById('story-feed-container');
            feedContainer.innerHTML = "";
            modal.classList.add('active');
            
            allActiveStories.forEach(story => {
                const author = getUserData(story.userId, story.userName, story.userPhoto);
                
                const isLiked = currentUser && story.likes && story.likes.includes(currentUser.uid);
                const likeCount = story.likes ? story.likes.length : 0;
                const isFollowing = myFollowingList.includes(story.userId);
                const isMe = currentUser && story.userId === currentUser.uid;

                let followBtnHtml = '';
                if(!isMe) {
                    followBtnHtml = `<button class="story-follow-btn" onclick="toggleFollow('${story.userId}')">${isFollowing ? 'Unfollow' : 'Follow'}</button>`;
                }
                
                const safeName = author.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                const safePhoto = author.photo;

                const item = document.createElement('div');
                item.className = "story-full-item";
                item.id = `story-view-${story.id}`;
                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="story-overlay-top">
                        <img src="${author.photo}" class="story-viewer-pic" onclick="openUserProfile('${story.userId}', '${safeName}', '${safePhoto}')">
                        <span class="story-viewer-name">${author.name} ${getVerifyBadge(author.isVerified)}</span>
                        ${followBtnHtml}
                        <div class="btn-close-story" onclick="closeStoryViewer()">×</div>
                    </div>
                    <img src="${story.imageUrl}" class="story-full-img">
                    <div class="story-overlay-right">
                        <div class="story-action-btn ${isLiked ? 'liked' : ''}" onclick="toggleStoryLike('${story.id}', this)">
                            <i class="${isLiked ? 'fas' : 'far'} fa-heart"></i>
                            <span class="like-count-display">${likeCount}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                feedContainer.appendChild(item);
            });
            setTimeout(() => {
                const target = document.getElementById(`story-view-${startStoryId}`);
                if(target) target.scrollIntoView();
            }, 100);
        }

        window.closeStoryViewer = () => { document.getElementById('story-viewer-modal').classList.remove('active'); }

        window.toggleStoryLike = async (storyId, btn) => {
            if(!currentUser) return;
            const storyRef = doc(db, "stories", storyId);
            const isLiked = btn.classList.contains('liked');
            const countSpan = btn.querySelector('.like-count-display');
            let currentCount = parseInt(countSpan.innerText);

            if(isLiked) {
                btn.classList.remove('liked'); btn.querySelector('i').className = "far fa-heart";
                countSpan.innerText = currentCount - 1;
                await updateDoc(storyRef, { likes: arrayRemove(currentUser.uid) });
            } else {
                btn.classList.add('liked'); btn.querySelector('i').className = "fas fa-heart";
                countSpan.innerText = currentCount + 1;
                await updateDoc(storyRef, { likes: arrayUnion(currentUser.uid) });
            }
        }

        // ================= POST UPLOAD =================
        let globalSelectedFiles = [];
        window.previewImages = (event) => {
            const newFiles = Array.from(event.target.files);
            if (globalSelectedFiles.length + newFiles.length > 5) {
                showToast("Max 5 images total!", "error"); event.target.value = ""; return;
            }
            globalSelectedFiles = globalSelectedFiles.concat(newFiles);
            renderPreviews();
            event.target.value = "";

        function renderPreviews() {
            const previewContainer = document.getElementById('preview-container');
            previewContainer.innerHTML = "";
            if (globalSelectedFiles.length > 0) {
                previewContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                globalSelectedFiles.forEach((file, index) => {
                    const reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function(e) {
                        const wrapper = document.createElement('div'); wrapper.className = 'preview-wrapper';
                        wrapper.innerHTML = `<img src="${e.target.result}" class="preview-thumb"><div class="remove-thumb-btn" onclick="removeImage(${index})"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></div>`;
                        previewContainer.appendChild(wrapper);
                    }
                    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
                });
            } else { previewContainer.style.display = 'none'; }
        }

        window.removeImage = (index) => { globalSelectedFiles.splice(index, 1); renderPreviews(); }

        window.uploadAndPublish = async () => {
            if(!currentUser) return;
            const desc = document.getElementById('post-desc').value;
            if(globalSelectedFiles.length === 0) { showToast("Please select at least one photo!", "error"); return; }
            document.getElementById('upload-loading').style.display = 'block';
            try {
                const uploadPromises = globalSelectedFiles.map(file => uploadToImgBB(file));
                const imageUrls = await Promise.all(uploadPromises);
                
                await addDoc(collection(db, "posts"), {
                    userId: currentUser.uid,
                    // Storing this as backup, but we use realtime fetch mostly
                    description: desc, imageUrls: imageUrls, imageUrl: imageUrls[0], likes: [], createdAt: Date.now()
                });
                showToast("Post published successfully!");
                document.getElementById('post-desc').value = ""; globalSelectedFiles = []; renderPreviews();
                document.getElementById('post-image-input').value = ""; switchTab('home');

        };

        // ================= HOME FEED =================
        function loadHomeFeed() {
            const q = query(collection(db, "posts"), orderBy("createdAt", "desc"));
            onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
                const splash = document.getElementById('splash-screen');
                if(splash) { splash.style.opacity = '0'; setTimeout(() => splash.style.display = 'none', 500); }

                allFeedPosts = []; 
                if (snapshot.empty) { 
                    document.getElementById('feed-container').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:50px; color:var(--text-light);">No posts yet.</div>`; 
                    return; 
                }

                snapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    const post = doc.data();
                    post.id = doc.id;
                    allFeedPosts.push(post);
                });
                renderFeedFromCache();
            });
        }

        function renderFeedFromCache() {
            const feedContainer = document.getElementById('feed-container');
            feedContainer.innerHTML = "";
            
            allFeedPosts.forEach(post => {
                // HERE IS THE MAGIC: Get User Data from Live Cache
                const author = getUserData(post.userId, post.userName, post.userPhoto);
                
                const likes = post.likes || [];
                const isLiked = currentUser && likes.includes(currentUser.uid);
                
                let imagesToDisplay = [];
                if (post.imageUrls && Array.isArray(post.imageUrls)) { imagesToDisplay = post.imageUrls; } else if (post.imageUrl) { imagesToDisplay = [post.imageUrl]; }

                let carouselItemsHtml = '';
                imagesToDisplay.forEach(url => {
                    carouselItemsHtml += `<div class="carousel-item"><img src="${url}" class="post-img" loading="lazy" onclick="openFullPostViewer('${post.id}')"></div>`;
                });

                let counterHtml = '';
                if (imagesToDisplay.length > 1) { counterHtml = `<div class="image-counter-badge" id="counter-${post.id}">1/${imagesToDisplay.length}</div>`; }

                let followBtnHtml = '';
                if (currentUser && post.userId !== currentUser.uid) {
                    const isFollowing = myFollowingList.includes(post.userId);
                    if(isFollowing) {
                         followBtnHtml = `<button class="btn-post-follow following" data-uid="${post.userId}" onclick="toggleFollow('${post.userId}')"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Following</button>`;
                    } else {
                         followBtnHtml = `<button class="btn-post-follow" data-uid="${post.userId}" onclick="toggleFollow('${post.userId}')"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Follow</button>`;
                    }
                }

                const descText = post.description || "";
                let descHtml = "";
                const maxLength = 80; 

                if (descText.length > maxLength) {
                    const shortText = descText.substring(0, maxLength) + "...";
                    descHtml = `
                        <span class="desc-text-content" id="short-desc-${post.id}">${shortText}</span>
                        <span class="desc-text-content" id="full-desc-${post.id}" style="display:none;">${descText}</span>
                        <span class="desc-toggle-btn" id="see-more-btn-${post.id}" onclick="toggleHomeDesc('${post.id}', true)">See more</span>
                        <span class="desc-toggle-btn" id="close-desc-btn-${post.id}" style="display:none;" onclick="toggleHomeDesc('${post.id}', false)">Close</span>
                    `;
                } else {
                    descHtml = `<span class="desc-text-content">${descText}</span>`;
                }

                const safeName = author.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                const safePhoto = author.photo;
                
                const html = `
                    <div class="post-card">
                        <div class="post-header">
                            <div class="post-header-left" onclick="openUserProfile('${post.userId}', '${safeName}', '${safePhoto}')">
                                <img src="${author.photo}" class="user-avatar" onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/40'">
                                <div><div class="user-name">${author.name} ${getVerifyBadge(author.isVerified)}</div><span class="post-time">${new Date(post.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span></div>
                            </div>
                            ${followBtnHtml}
                        </div>
                        <div class="post-desc">${descHtml}</div>
                        <div class="carousel-wrapper">
                            <div class="carousel-track" onscroll="updateCounter(this, '${post.id}', ${imagesToDisplay.length})">${carouselItemsHtml}</div>
                            ${counterHtml}
                        </div>
                        <div class="action-bar">
                            <div class="action-btn ${isLiked ? 'liked' : ''}" onclick="toggleLike('${post.id}')">
                                <i class="${isLiked ? 'fas' : 'far'} fa-heart"></i><span class="action-count">${likes.length}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="action-btn" onclick="openComments('${post.id}')">
                                <i class="far fa-comment-dots"></i><span class="action-count">Comment</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                feedContainer.innerHTML += html;
            });
        }

        window.toggleHomeDesc = (postId, showFull) => {
            const shortSpan = document.getElementById(`short-desc-${postId}`);
            const fullSpan = document.getElementById(`full-desc-${postId}`);
            const seeMoreBtn = document.getElementById(`see-more-btn-${postId}`);
            const closeBtn = document.getElementById(`close-desc-btn-${postId}`);

            if (showFull) {
                shortSpan.style.display = 'none';
                fullSpan.style.display = 'inline';
                seeMoreBtn.style.display = 'none';
                closeBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
            } else {
                shortSpan.style.display = 'inline';
                fullSpan.style.display = 'none';
                seeMoreBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
                closeBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        window.updateCounter = (track, pid, total) => {
            if(total <= 1) return;
            const width = track.offsetWidth;
            const scrollLeft = track.scrollLeft;
            const index = Math.round(scrollLeft / width);
            const badge = document.getElementById(`counter-${pid}`);
            if(badge) badge.innerText = `${index + 1}/${total}`;
        }

                else if(post.imageUrl) images = [post.imageUrl];

                const safeName = author.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                const safePhoto = author.photo;
                const desc = post.description || "";

                if(images.length > 1) {
                    navBtns = `
                        <div class="fs-nav-btn fs-prev" onclick="changeFsImage('${post.id}', -1, ${imgData})"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></div>
                        <div class="fs-nav-btn fs-next" onclick="changeFsImage('${post.id}', 1, ${imgData})"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></div>
                        <div class="image-counter-badge" id="fs-counter-${post.id}" style="top:20px; right:20px;">1/${images.length}</div>
                    `;
                }

                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="fp-img-container">
                        ${navBtns}
                        <img src="${images[0]}" class="fp-img" id="fs-img-${post.id}" data-idx="0">
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="fp-overlay-right">
                        <div class="fp-profile-pic-wrap" onclick="closeFullPostViewer(); openUserProfile('${post.userId}', '${safeName}', '${safePhoto}')">
                            <img src="${author.photo}" class="fp-profile-pic">
                            <div style="position:absolute; bottom:-5px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:red; color:white; border-radius:50%; width:15px; height:15px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:10px; border:1px solid white;">+</div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="fp-action-btn ${isLiked ? 'liked' : ''}" id="fp-like-btn-${post.id}" onclick="toggleLike('${post.id}')">
                            <i class="${isLiked ? 'fas' : 'far'} fa-heart"></i>
                            <span id="fp-like-count-${post.id}">${likes.length}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="fp-action-btn" onclick="openComments('${post.id}')">
                            <i class="fas fa-comment-dots"></i>
                            <span id="fp-comment-count-${post.id}">...</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="fp-overlay-bottom">
                        <div class="fp-username">@${author.name} ${getVerifyBadge(author.isVerified)}</div>
                        <div class="fp-desc" id="fp-desc-${post.id}">${desc}</div>
                        <div class="fp-see-more" onclick="toggleFullPostDesc('${post.id}', true)" id="fp-more-${post.id}">See more</div>
                        <div class="fp-close-desc" onclick="toggleFullPostDesc('${post.id}', false)" id="fp-close-${post.id}">Close</div>
                    </div>
                `;
                feed.appendChild(item);
                
                if(desc.length < 50) {
                     document.getElementById(`fp-more-${post.id}`).style.display = 'none';
                }
            });

            setTimeout(() => {
                const target = document.getElementById(`fp-view-${startPostId}`);
                if(target) target.scrollIntoView();
            }, 100);

            fetchCommentCountsForFullScreen();
        }

        window.changeFsImage = (postId, dir, images) => {
            const imgEl = document.getElementById(`fs-img-${postId}`);
            const counterEl = document.getElementById(`fs-counter-${postId}`);
            let currentIdx = parseInt(imgEl.getAttribute('data-idx'));
            
            let newIdx = currentIdx + dir;
            if(newIdx < 0) newIdx = images.length - 1;
            if(newIdx >= images.length) newIdx = 0;
            
            imgEl.style.opacity = 0;
            setTimeout(() => {
                imgEl.src = images[newIdx];
                imgEl.setAttribute('data-idx', newIdx);
                if(counterEl) counterEl.innerText = `${newIdx + 1}/${images.length}`;
                imgEl.style.opacity = 1;
            }, 200);
        }

        async function fetchCommentCountsForFullScreen() {
             for (const post of allFeedPosts) {
                const countSpan = document.getElementById(`fp-comment-count-${post.id}`);
                if (countSpan) {
                    const q = query(collection(db, "comments"), where("postId", "==", post.id));
                    const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
                    countSpan.innerText = snapshot.size;
                }
             }
        }

        window.closeFullPostViewer = () => {
            document.getElementById('full-post-viewer-modal').classList.remove('active');
        }

        window.toggleFullPostDesc = (pid, expand) => {
            const descEl = document.getElementById(`fp-desc-${pid}`);
            const moreBtn = document.getElementById(`fp-more-${pid}`);
            const closeBtn = document.getElementById(`fp-close-${pid}`);
            
            if(expand) {
                descEl.classList.add('expanded');
                moreBtn.style.display = 'none';
                closeBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
            } else {
                descEl.classList.remove('expanded');
                moreBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
                closeBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        // ================= USER PROFILE VIEW =================
        window.openUserProfile = async (targetUid, name = "User", photo = "https://via.placeholder.com/100") => {
            if(!currentUser) {
                showToast("Please login to view profile", "error");
                document.getElementById('auth-section').style.display = 'flex';
                return;
            }
            if(targetUid === currentUser.uid) { switchTab('profile'); return; }
            document.getElementById('user-view-page').classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('main-nav').style.display = 'none';
            
            // Initial render with passed data or fallback
            document.getElementById('uv-name').innerText = name;
            document.getElementById('uv-pic').src = photo;
            document.getElementById('uv-stat-posts').innerText = "..."; 
            
            const followBtn = document.getElementById('uv-follow-btn');
            followBtn.setAttribute('data-uid', targetUid); 
            updateSingleFollowButtonUI(followBtn, targetUid);
            followBtn.onclick = () => toggleFollow(targetUid);
            document.getElementById('uv-posts-grid').innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; padding:20px; color:#999;">Loading...</div>';

            if(userViewUnsubscribe) userViewUnsubscribe();
            userViewUnsubscribe = onSnapshot(doc(db, "users", targetUid), (docSnap) => {
                if(docSnap.exists()) {
                    const data = docSnap.data();
                    document.getElementById('uv-name').innerHTML = data.name + getVerifyBadge(data.isVerified);
                    document.getElementById('uv-stat-followers').innerText = (data.followers || []).length;
                    document.getElementById('uv-stat-following').innerText = (data.following || []).length;
                    document.getElementById('uv-pic').src = data.photoURL || data.photo;
                }
            });

            const q = query(collection(db, "posts"), where("userId", "==", targetUid), orderBy("createdAt", "desc"));
            onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
                const grid = document.getElementById('uv-posts-grid');
                grid.innerHTML = "";
                document.getElementById('uv-stat-posts').innerText = snapshot.size;
                snapshot.forEach(docSnap => {
                    const post = docSnap.data();
                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                    div.className = 'grid-item';
                    let thumb = post.imageUrl;
                    let isMulti = false;
                    if(post.imageUrls && post.imageUrls.length > 1) { thumb = post.imageUrls[0]; isMulti = true; }
                    div.innerHTML = `<img src="${thumb}">${isMulti ? '<div class="multi-icon"><i class="fas fa-clone"></i></div>' : ''}`;
                    grid.appendChild(div);
                });
            });
        }

        window.closeUserView = () => {
            document.getElementById('user-view-page').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('main-nav').style.display = 'flex';
            if(userViewUnsubscribe) userViewUnsubscribe();
        }

        // ================= INTERACTIONS =================
        window.toggleFollow = async (targetUid) => {
            if(!currentUser) {
                showToast("Please login to follow", "error");
                document.getElementById('auth-section').style.display = 'flex';
                return;
            }
            const myRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
            const targetRef = doc(db, "users", targetUid);
            const isFollowing = myFollowingList.includes(targetUid);
            if (isFollowing) {
                myFollowingList = myFollowingList.filter(id => id !== targetUid);
                showToast("Unfollowed");
            } else {
                myFollowingList.push(targetUid);
                showToast("Following!");
            }
            
            const btns = document.querySelectorAll(`.btn-post-follow[data-uid="${targetUid}"], #uv-follow-btn`);
            btns.forEach(btn => {
                if(btn.id === 'uv-follow-btn' && btn.getAttribute('data-uid') !== targetUid) return;
                updateSingleFollowButtonUI(btn, targetUid);
            });
            
            try {
                if(isFollowing) {
                    await updateDoc(myRef, { following: arrayRemove(targetUid) });
                    await updateDoc(targetRef, { followers: arrayRemove(currentUser.uid) });
                } else {
                    await updateDoc(myRef, { following: arrayUnion(targetUid) });
                    await updateDoc(targetRef, { followers: arrayUnion(currentUser.uid) });
                }
            } catch (err) { console.error("Follow error:", err); }
        }

        window.toggleLike = async (postId) => {
            if (!currentUser) { showToast("Please login to like", "error"); document.getElementById('auth-section').style.display = 'flex'; return; }
            const postRef = doc(db, "posts", postId);
            
            const fpBtn = document.getElementById(`fp-like-btn-${postId}`);
            const fpCount = document.getElementById(`fp-like-count-${postId}`);
            
            let actionAdd = true;
            
            const postData = allFeedPosts.find(p => p.id === postId);
            if(postData && postData.likes && postData.likes.includes(currentUser.uid)) {
                actionAdd = false;
            }

            if(postData) {
                if(actionAdd) { if(!postData.likes) postData.likes=[]; postData.likes.push(currentUser.uid); }
                else { postData.likes = postData.likes.filter(uid => uid !== currentUser.uid); }
            }

            if(fpBtn && fpCount) {
                let c = parseInt(fpCount.innerText);
                if(actionAdd) {
                    fpBtn.classList.add('liked'); fpBtn.querySelector('i').className = 'fas fa-heart'; fpCount.innerText = c + 1;
                } else {
                    fpBtn.classList.remove('liked'); fpBtn.querySelector('i').className = 'far fa-heart'; fpCount.innerText = c - 1;
                }
            }

            try {
                if (!actionAdd) { await updateDoc(postRef, { likes: arrayRemove(currentUser.uid) }); } 
                else { await updateDoc(postRef, { likes: arrayUnion(currentUser.uid) }); }
            } catch (error) { console.error("Like Error", error); }
        };

        window.openComments = (postId) => {
            if (!currentUser) { showToast("Login to view comments", "error"); document.getElementById('auth-section').style.display = 'flex'; return; }
            activePostIdForComments = postId;
            document.getElementById('comment-overlay').classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('comment-sheet-modal').classList.add('active');
            if(commentsUnsubscribe) commentsUnsubscribe();
            const container = document.getElementById('comments-container');
            container.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align: center; color: #999; margin-top: 50px;"><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Loading...</div>`;
            const q = query(collection(db, "comments"), where("postId", "==", postId));
            commentsUnsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
                container.innerHTML = "";
                if(snapshot.empty) { container.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; color:#999; margin-top:50px; font-size:13px;">No comments yet.</div>`; return; }
                let commentsArray = [];
                snapshot.forEach(doc => commentsArray.push(doc.data()));
                commentsArray.sort((a, b) => a.createdAt - b.createdAt);
                
                commentsArray.forEach(c => {
                    const author = getUserData(c.userId, c.userName, c.userPhoto);
                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                    div.className = "single-comment";
                    div.innerHTML = `<img src="${author.photo}" class="comment-avatar" onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/32'"><div class="comment-content"><div class="comment-user">${author.name} ${getVerifyBadge(author.isVerified)}</div><div class="comment-text">${c.text}</div></div>`;
                    container.appendChild(div);
                });
                container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
            });
        };

        window.closeComments = () => {
            document.getElementById('comment-overlay').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('comment-sheet-modal').classList.remove('active');
            if(commentsUnsubscribe) commentsUnsubscribe();
            activePostIdForComments = null;
        };

        window.postComment = async () => {
            const input = document.getElementById('new-comment-input');
            const text = input.value.trim();
            if(!text || !activePostIdForComments) return;
            try {
                await addDoc(collection(db, "comments"), {
                    postId: activePostIdForComments, userId: currentUser.uid, 
                    // Storing temp data, render uses live data
                    text: text, createdAt: Date.now()
                });
                input.value = ""; 
                const fpCountSpan = document.getElementById(`fp-comment-count-${activePostIdForComments}`);
                if(fpCountSpan) {
                     let c = parseInt(fpCountSpan.innerText);
                     if(isNaN(c)) c = 0;
                     fpCountSpan.innerText = c + 1;
                }
            } catch (error) { showToast("Failed to post comment!", "error"); }
        };

        async function loadUserProfile() {
            if(!currentUser) return;
            const userData = getUserData(currentUser.uid, currentUser.displayName, currentUser.photoURL);
            document.getElementById('profile-name-display').innerHTML = userData.name + getVerifyBadge(userData.isVerified);
            document.getElementById('profile-pic-display').src = userData.photo;

            try {
                const userDocRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
                const userSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);
                if (userSnap.exists()) {
                    const data = userSnap.data();
                    document.getElementById('stat-followers').innerText = (data.followers || []).length;
                    document.getElementById('stat-following').innerText = (data.following || []).length;
                }
            } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
            const q = query(collection(db, "posts"), where("userId", "==", currentUser.uid), orderBy("createdAt", "desc"));
            onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
                const grid = document.getElementById('my-posts-grid');
                grid.innerHTML = "";
                document.getElementById('stat-posts').innerText = snapshot.size;
                snapshot.forEach(docSnap => {
                    const post = docSnap.data();
                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                    div.className = 'grid-item';
                    let thumb = post.imageUrl;
                    let isMulti = false;
                    if(post.imageUrls && post.imageUrls.length > 1) { thumb = post.imageUrls[0]; isMulti = true; }
                    div.innerHTML = `<img src="${thumb}">${isMulti ? '<div class="multi-icon"><i class="fas fa-clone"></i></div>' : ''}<button class="delete-btn" onclick="deletePost('${docSnap.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>`;
                    grid.appendChild(div);
                });
            });
        }

        window.deletePost = async (docId) => {
            if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this post?")) {
                await deleteDoc(doc(db, "posts", docId));
                showToast("Post deleted.");
            }
        };

        window.openEditModal = () => {
            document.getElementById('edit-modal').style.display = 'flex';
            const userData = getUserData(currentUser.uid, currentUser.displayName);
            document.getElementById('edit-name-input').value = userData.name;
            document.getElementById('edit-pic-preview-img').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('edit-pic-text').style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('edit-pic-file').value = "";
        };

        window.closeEditModal = () => { document.getElementById('edit-modal').style.display = 'none'; };

        window.previewEditImage = (event) => {
            const file = event.target.files[0];
            if(file){
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(e) {
                    const img = document.getElementById('edit-pic-preview-img');
                    const text = document.getElementById('edit-pic-text');
                    img.src = e.target.result; img.style.display = 'block'; text.style.display = 'none';
                }
                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            }
        };

        window.saveProfileChanges = async () => {
            const newName = document.getElementById('edit-name-input').value;
            const file = document.getElementById('edit-pic-file').files[0];
            document.getElementById('edit-loading').style.display = 'block';
            try {
                let photoURL = currentUser.photoURL;
                if (file) photoURL = await uploadToImgBB(file);
                
                await updateProfile(currentUser, { displayName: newName, photoURL: photoURL });
                const userDocRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
                await updateDoc(userDocRef, { name: newName, photoURL: photoURL, photo: photoURL }); // Update both fields for safety
                
                loadUserProfile(); 
                closeEditModal(); 
                showToast("Profile Updated!");
            } catch (error) { showToast(error.message, "error"); } 
            finally { document.getElementById('edit-loading').style.display = 'none'; }
        };
    </script>
</body>
</html>
